query: Document this repository. It has no docs yet.
expected_behavior: Runs detect-context.sh and reports MODE=bootstrap (no docs/ directory exists)
Reads the manifest (package.json/go.mod/etc.) and uses the exact pinned versions and real script names in the README quickstart — no invented commands or flags

Creates README.md plus a docs/ tree (overview, architecture, per-module docs, api reference) scaled to the repo; skips modules/ or api/ trees the repo does not warrant and drops their links from the README so there are no dead links
Uses the code's own domain vocabulary (types, routes, table names) rather than invented synonyms
Includes at least one Mermaid diagram in architecture.md
Keeps reference pages (modules/, api/) factual and puts the 'why' in overview/architecture — does not blur Diátaxis modes, and does not fabricate a tutorial or how-to guide
Runs the review loop and reaches zero INCORRECT findings (or leaves <!-- TODO --> markers if the 3-pass cap is hit)
Writes changes to a docs/ branch and opens a PR titled 'docs: ...' rather than committing to the default branch
Never copies secret values into docs — references variable names only; adds no AI attribution to commits or the PR
